transcript: So it's your choice, slug or buckshot?
Bring Frank with ya, pal. Bring '[beep]' a gun with ya, too.
See you when you get here, with your friend, Frank. And bring a gun with ya. Make sure it's loaded, make sure you know how to use it.
I'm gonna make you back up, you--
--friend Frank, and get the hell out here! Get your friend Frank, come out here, and show me how you're gonna fuckin' kick the money out of my ass!
BRING A FUCKING GUN, AND BEAT IT OUT OF MY FUCKIN' ASS!

DO IT! NOW, ASSHOLE! I SPENT FOUR '[beep]' YEARS IN VIETNAM WITH THE MARINE CORPS, ASSHOLE! YOU DON'T KNOW WHO YOU'RE FUCKIN' WITH! NOW GET YOUR ASS OUT HERE, WITH YOUR BIG, HARD-ASS BUDDY FRANK, AND WE'LL DO SOME FUCKIN' BUSINESS!
You started it, now BACK IT UP! BACK IT UP, ASSHOLE! GET YOUR FUCKIN' ASSHOLE FRIEND FRANK, AND GET OUT HERE!
That's exactly what you're gonna have to do!
